1|{
 2|  "name": "@matchbox/wazuh-mcp",
 3|  "version": "1.0.0",
 4|  "description": "MCP server for Wazuh REST API — query alerts, agents, vulnerabilities from Claude Code",
 5|  "type": "module",
 6|  "main": "dist/index.js",
 7|  "scripts": {
 8|    "build": "tsc",
 9|    "dev": "tsx src/index.ts",
10|    "start": "node dist/index.js"
11|  },
12|  "dependencies": {
13|    "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.9.0",
14|    "zod": "^3.22.0"
15|  },
16|  "devDependencies": {
17|    "typescript": "^5.3.0",
18|    "@types/node": "^20.0.0",
19|    "tsx": "^4.0.0"
20|  }
21|}
22|

1|{
 2|  "compilerOptions": {
 3|    "target": "ES2022",
 4|    "module": "ESNext",
 5|    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
 6|    "outDir": "./dist",
 7|    "rootDir": "./src",
 8|    "strict": true,
 9|    "esModuleInterop": true,
10|    "skipLibCheck": true,
11|    "declaration": true
12|  },
13|  "include": ["src/**/*"]
14|}
15|

1|#!/bin/bash
  2|# Deploy the full MatchBox SOC stack to k3s
  3|# Usage: ./scripts/deploy-stack.sh [component]
  4|#   component: all | namespaces | shared | wazuh | thehive | opencti | monitoring | ingress
  5|set -euo pipefail
  6|
  7|SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
  8|PROJECT_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
  9|K8S_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/k8s"
 10|
 11|# Set kubeconfig if not already set
 12|if [ -z "${KUBECONFIG:-}" ]; then
 13|  KUBECONFIG_PATH="$(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Dir}}')/copied-from-guest/kubeconfig.yaml"
 14|  export KUBECONFIG="$KUBECONFIG_PATH"
 15|fi
 16|
 17|COMPONENT="${1:-all}"
 18|
 19|# Validate prerequisites
 20|for cmd in kubectl helm; do
 21|  if ! command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null; then
 22|    echo "ERROR: $cmd not found. Run ./scripts/setup-lima.sh first."
 23|    exit 1
 24|  fi
 25|done
 26|
 27|# Verify cluster connectivity
 28|if ! kubectl cluster-info &>/dev/null; then
 29|  echo "ERROR: Cannot connect to Kubernetes cluster."
 30|  echo "  Check KUBECONFIG: ${KUBECONFIG:-not set}"
 31|  echo "  Is the Lima VM running? limactl list"
 32|  exit 1
 33|fi
 34|
 35|# Validate secrets are not using placeholder values
 36|validate_secrets() {
 37|  local secrets_file="$K8S_DIR/shared/secrets.yaml"
 38|  if [ -f "$secrets_file" ]; then
 39|    if grep -q "Q0hBTkdFX01F" "$secrets_file" 2>/dev/null; then
 40|      echo "ERROR: secrets.yaml contains placeholder 'CHANGE_ME' values (base64-encoded)."
 41|      echo "  Edit $secrets_file and replace all placeholder passwords before deploying."
 42|      echo "  Template: $K8S_DIR/shared/secrets.yaml.example"
 43|      exit 1
 44|    fi
 45|  else
 46|    echo "WARNING: $secrets_file not found."
 47|    echo "  Copy $K8S_DIR/shared/secrets.yaml.example to $K8S_DIR/shared/secrets.yaml"
 48|    echo "  and fill in real credential values before deploying."
 49|    exit 1
 50|  fi
 51|}
 52|
 53|echo "=== MatchBox — Stack Deployment ==="
 54|echo "Component: $COMPONENT"
 55|echo ""
 56|
 57|# Always validate secrets before deploying
 58|validate_secrets
 59|
 60|deploy_namespaces() {
 61|  echo "[namespaces] Creating Kubernetes namespaces..."
 62|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/namespaces.yaml"
 63|
 64|  echo "[network-policies] Applying NetworkPolicies..."
 65|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/network-policies.yaml"
 66|  echo "  Done."

67|}
 68|
 69|deploy_shared() {
 70|  echo "[shared] Deploying shared infrastructure..."
 71|
 72|  echo "  OpenSearch..."
 73|  helm upgrade --install opensearch opensearch/opensearch \
 74|    -n shared -f "$K8S_DIR/shared/opensearch.yaml" \
 75|    --wait --timeout 5m
 76|
 77|  echo "  Redis..."
 78|  helm upgrade --install redis bitnami/redis \
 79|    -n shared -f "$K8S_DIR/shared/redis.yaml" \
 80|    --wait --timeout 3m
 81|
 82|  echo "  RabbitMQ..."
 83|  helm upgrade --install rabbitmq bitnami/rabbitmq \
 84|    -n shared -f "$K8S_DIR/shared/rabbitmq.yaml" \
 85|    --wait --timeout 3m
 86|
 87|  echo "  MinIO..."
 88|  helm upgrade --install minio minio/minio \
 89|    -n shared -f "$K8S_DIR/shared/minio.yaml" \
 90|    --wait --timeout 3m
 91|
 92|  echo "  NFS Server..."
 93|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/storage/nfs-server.yaml"
 94|
 95|  echo "  Storage PVs/PVCs..."
 96|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/storage/pv-claims.yaml"
 97|
 98|  echo "  Done. Waiting for pods to be ready..."
 99|  kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=opensearch -n shared --timeout=300s || true
100|  echo "  Shared infrastructure deployed."
101|}
102|
103|deploy_wazuh() {
104|  echo "[wazuh] Deploying Wazuh SIEM/XDR..."
105|
106|  echo "  Applying ConfigMaps..."
107|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/wazuh/manager/configmap-ossec.yaml"
108|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/wazuh/manager/configmap-rules.yaml"
109|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/wazuh/manager/configmap-decoders.yaml"
110|
111|  echo "  Deploying Wazuh Agent DaemonSet..."
112|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/wazuh/agents/daemonset.yaml"
113|
114|  # Note: Full Wazuh deployment depends on available Helm chart
115|  # If community chart is unavailable, use raw manifests
116|  echo "  NOTE: Wazuh Helm chart may need manual setup."
117|  echo "  Refer to: https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/deploying-with-kubernetes/"
118|
119|  echo "  Done."
120|}
121|
122|deploy_thehive() {
123|  echo "[thehive] Deploying TheHive + Cortex..."
124|
125|  echo "  Applying Cortex RBAC..."
126|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/thehive/cortex/rbac.yaml"
127|
128|  echo "  Deploying TheHive..."
129|  helm upgrade --install thehive strangebee/thehive \
130|    -n thehive -f "$K8S_DIR/thehive/helm-values.yaml" \
131|    --wait --timeout 5m || echo "  WARN: TheHive Helm install may need manual adjustment"
132|
133|  echo "  Deploying Cortex..."
134|  helm upgrade --install cortex strangebee/cortex \
135|    -n thehive -f "$K8S_DIR/thehive/cortex/helm-values.yaml" \
136|    --wait --timeout 5m || echo "  WARN: Cortex Helm install may need manual adjustment"
137|
138|  echo "  Done."

139|}
140|
141|deploy_opencti() {
142|  echo "[opencti] Deploying OpenCTI Threat Intelligence..."
143|
144|  echo "  Creating OpenCTI Secrets from environment variables..."
145|  local octi_token="${OPENCTI_ADMIN_TOKEN:-}"
146|  local octi_password="${OPENCTI_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-}"
147|  local health_key="${OPENCTI_HEALTH_KEY:-}"
148|  local otx_key="${ALIENVAULT_OTX_API_KEY:-}"
149|  local abuse_key="${ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY:-}"
150|  local vt_key="${VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY:-}"
151|  if [ -z "$octi_token" ] || [ -z "$octi_password" ]; then
152|    echo "  ERROR: OPENCTI_ADMIN_TOKEN and OPENCTI_ADMIN_PASSWORD env vars are required."
153|    echo "  Export before deploying: export OPENCTI_ADMIN_TOKEN=<token> OPENCTI_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<password>"
154|    exit 1
155|  fi
156|  kubectl create secret generic soc-opencti-secrets -n opencti \
157|    --from-literal=admin-token="$octi_token" \
158|    --from-literal=admin-password="$octi_password" \
159|    --from-literal=health-access-key="${health_key:-$(openssl rand -hex 16)}" \
160|    --from-literal=alienvault-api-key="${otx_key:-placeholder}" \
161|    --from-literal=abuseipdb-api-key="${abuse_key:-placeholder}" \
162|    --from-literal=virustotal-api-key="${vt_key:-placeholder}" \
163|    --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
164|  if [ -z "$otx_key" ] || [ -z "$abuse_key" ] || [ -z "$vt_key" ]; then
165|    echo "  WARNING: Some threat intel API keys not set. Connectors will fail until updated."
166|    echo "  Set: ALIENVAULT_OTX_API_KEY, ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY, VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY"
167|  fi
168|
169|  echo "  Deploying OpenCTI platform..."
170|  helm upgrade --install opencti opencti/opencti \
171|    -n opencti -f "$K8S_DIR/opencti/helm-values.yaml" \
172|    --wait --timeout 10m || echo "  WARN: OpenCTI Helm install may need manual adjustment"
173|
174|  echo "  Deploying connectors..."
175|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/opencti/connectors/"
176|
177|  echo "  Done. Remember to update API keys in opencti-secrets!"
178|}
179|
180|deploy_monitoring() {
181|  echo "[monitoring] Deploying Prometheus + Grafana..."
182|
183|  helm upgrade --install monitoring prometheus-community/kube-prometheus-stack \
184|    -n monitoring -f "$K8S_DIR/monitoring/kube-prometheus-values.yaml" \
185|    --wait --timeout 10m
186|
187|  echo "  Done."
188|}
189|
190|deploy_ingress() {
191|  echo "[ingress] Deploying Traefik IngressRoutes..."
192|
193|  echo "  Installing Traefik..."
194|  helm upgrade --install traefik traefik/traefik -n kube-system \
195|    --set resources.requests.memory=64Mi \
196|    --set resources.limits.memory=128Mi \
197|    --wait --timeout 3m
198|
199|  echo "  Applying IngressRoutes..."
200|  kubectl apply -f "$K8S_DIR/ingress/traefik-routes.yaml"
201|
202|  echo "  Done."

203|  echo ""
204|  echo "  Add to /etc/hosts: 127.0.0.1 soc.homelab.local"
205|}
206|
207|# Execute based on component argument
208|case "$COMPONENT" in
209|  all)
210|    deploy_namespaces
211|    deploy_shared
212|    deploy_wazuh
213|    deploy_thehive
214|    deploy_opencti
215|    deploy_monitoring
216|    deploy_ingress
217|    ;;
218|  namespaces) deploy_namespaces ;;
219|  shared) deploy_shared ;;
220|  wazuh) deploy_wazuh ;;
221|  thehive) deploy_thehive ;;
222|  opencti) deploy_opencti ;;
223|  monitoring) deploy_monitoring ;;
224|  ingress) deploy_ingress ;;
225|  *)
226|    echo "Usage: $0 [all|namespaces|shared|wazuh|thehive|opencti|monitoring|ingress]"
227|    exit 1
228|    ;;
229|esac
230|
231|echo ""
232|echo "=== Deployment Complete ==="
233|echo ""
234|echo "Check status: kubectl get pods --all-namespaces"
235|echo "Dashboards:   https://soc.homelab.local/{wazuh,thehive,opencti,grafana}"
236|

1|#!/bin/bash
  2|# Setup Lima VM with k3s for MatchBox
  3|# Usage: ./scripts/setup-lima.sh
  4|set -euo pipefail
  5|
  6|SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
  7|PROJECT_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
  8|
  9|echo "=== MatchBox — Lima VM Setup ==="
 10|
 11|# Ensure Homebrew is in PATH (common issue on Apple Silicon)
 12|if [ -f /opt/homebrew/bin/brew ]; then
 13|  eval "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv)"
 14|elif [ -f /usr/local/bin/brew ]; then
 15|  eval "$(/usr/local/bin/brew shellenv)"
 16|fi
 17|
 18|# Check prerequisites
 19|echo "[1/5] Checking prerequisites..."
 20|if ! command -v brew &>/dev/null; then
 21|  echo "ERROR: Homebrew not found. Install from https://brew.sh"
 22|  exit 1
 23|fi
 24|echo "  brew: OK"
 25|
 26|for cmd in limactl kubectl helm; do
 27|  if ! command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null; then
 28|    echo "  Installing $cmd..."
 29|    case $cmd in
 30|      limactl) brew install lima ;;
 31|      kubectl) brew install kubectl ;;
 32|      helm) brew install helm ;;
 33|    esac
 34|  else
 35|    echo "  $cmd: OK ($(command -v "$cmd"))"
 36|  fi
 37|done
 38|
 39|# Check if VM already exists
 40|if limactl list --format '{{.Name}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^k3s-soc$"; then
 41|  echo "[!] Lima VM 'k3s-soc' already exists."

42|  echo "    Status: $(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Status}}')"
 43|  echo "    To recreate: limactl delete k3s-soc && ./scripts/setup-lima.sh"
 44|
 45|  # Start if stopped
 46|  if [ "$(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Status}}')" = "Stopped" ]; then
 47|    echo "    Starting stopped VM..."
 48|    limactl start k3s-soc
 49|  fi
 50|else
 51|  # Create and start Lima VM
 52|  echo "[2/5] Creating Lima VM (10GB RAM, 4 CPUs, 120GB disk)..."
 53|  echo "  This will take a few minutes on first boot..."
 54|  limactl start "$PROJECT_DIR/lima/k3s-soc.yaml" --name k3s-soc
 55|fi
 56|
 57|# Configure kubeconfig
 58|echo "[3/5] Configuring kubeconfig..."
 59|KUBECONFIG_PATH="$(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Dir}}')/copied-from-guest/kubeconfig.yaml"
 60|
 61|if [ -f "$KUBECONFIG_PATH" ]; then
 62|  # Fix server address for macOS access
 63|  sed -i '' 's/0\.0\.0\.0/127.0.0.1/g' "$KUBECONFIG_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
 64|  export KUBECONFIG="$KUBECONFIG_PATH"
 65|  echo "  KUBECONFIG=$KUBECONFIG_PATH"
 66|else
 67|  echo "  ERROR: kubeconfig not found at $KUBECONFIG_PATH"
 68|  echo "  Trying manual copy..."
 69|  limactl shell k3s-soc sudo cat /etc/rancher/k3s/k3s.yaml > /tmp/k3s-soc-kubeconfig.yaml
 70|  sed -i '' 's/127\.0\.0\.1/127.0.0.1/g' /tmp/k3s-soc-kubeconfig.yaml
 71|  KUBECONFIG_PATH="/tmp/k3s-soc-kubeconfig.yaml"
 72|  export KUBECONFIG="$KUBECONFIG_PATH"
 73|fi
 74|
 75|# Wait for k3s to be ready
 76|echo "[4/5] Waiting for k3s cluster to be ready..."
 77|for i in $(seq 1 30); do
 78|  if kubectl get nodes &>/dev/null; then
 79|    echo "  k3s cluster is ready!"

80|    kubectl get nodes
 81|    break
 82|  fi
 83|  echo "  Waiting... ($i/30)"
 84|  sleep 10
 85|done
 86|
 87|# Add Helm repos
 88|echo "[5/5] Adding Helm repositories..."
 89|helm repo add opensearch https://opensearch-project.github.io/helm-charts/ 2>/dev/null || true
 90|helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami 2>/dev/null || true
 91|helm repo add minio https://charts.min.io/ 2>/dev/null || true
 92|helm repo add strangebee https://strangebee.github.io/helm-charts/ 2>/dev/null || true
 93|helm repo add opencti https://devops-ia.github.io/helm-opencti/ 2>/dev/null || true
 94|helm repo add prometheus-community https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts/ 2>/dev/null || true
 95|helm repo add traefik https://traefik.github.io/charts 2>/dev/null || true
 96|helm repo update
 97|
 98|echo ""
 99|echo "=== Setup Complete ==="
100|echo ""
101|echo "To use kubectl from your terminal, run:"
102|echo "  export KUBECONFIG=$KUBECONFIG_PATH"
103|echo ""
104|echo "Next step: Deploy the SOC stack:"
105|echo "  ./scripts/deploy-stack.sh"
106|

1|#!/bin/bash
  2|# Teardown MatchBox SOC stack
  3|# Usage: ./scripts/teardown.sh [component|all|vm]
  4|#   component: shared | wazuh | thehive | opencti | monitoring | ingress
  5|#   all: remove all Helm releases and k8s resources (keep VM)
  6|#   vm: remove everything including the Lima VM
  7|set -euo pipefail
  8|
  9|SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
 10|PROJECT_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
 11|K8S_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/k8s"
 12|
 13|if [ -z "${KUBECONFIG:-}" ]; then
 14|  KUBECONFIG_PATH="$(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Dir}}')/copied-from-guest/kubeconfig.yaml" 2>/dev/null || true
 15|  export KUBECONFIG="${KUBECONFIG_PATH:-}"
 16|fi
 17|
 18|COMPONENT="${1:-}"
 19|
 20|if [ -z "$COMPONENT" ]; then
 21|  echo "Usage: $0 [shared|wazuh|thehive|opencti|monitoring|ingress|all|vm]"
 22|  echo ""
 23|  echo "  shared     - Remove OpenSearch, Redis, RabbitMQ, MinIO, NFS"
 24|  echo "  wazuh      - Remove Wazuh stack"
 25|  echo "  thehive    - Remove TheHive + Cortex"
 26|  echo "  opencti    - Remove OpenCTI + connectors"
 27|  echo "  monitoring - Remove Prometheus + Grafana"
 28|  echo "  ingress    - Remove Traefik IngressRoutes"
 29|  echo "  all        - Remove all components (keep Lima VM)"
 30|  echo "  vm         - Remove everything including Lima VM"
 31|  exit 1
 32|fi
 33|
 34|# Validate cluster connectivity before teardown
 35|if [ "$COMPONENT" != "vm" ]; then
 36|  if ! kubectl cluster-info &>/dev/null; then
 37|    echo "ERROR: Cannot connect to Kubernetes cluster."

37|    echo "ERROR: Cannot connect to Kubernetes cluster."
 38|    echo "  Check KUBECONFIG: ${KUBECONFIG:-not set}"
 39|    echo "  If the VM is stopped, use: $0 vm"
 40|    exit 1
 41|  fi
 42|fi
 43|
 44|echo "=== MatchBox — Teardown ==="
 45|echo "Component: $COMPONENT"
 46|echo ""
 47|
 48|teardown_ingress() {
 49|  echo "[ingress] Removing Traefik routes..."
 50|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/ingress/traefik-routes.yaml" --ignore-not-found
 51|}
 52|
 53|teardown_monitoring() {
 54|  echo "[monitoring] Removing Prometheus + Grafana..."
 55|  helm uninstall monitoring -n monitoring 2>/dev/null || true
 56|}
 57|
 58|teardown_opencti() {
 59|  echo "[opencti] Removing OpenCTI..."
 60|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/opencti/connectors/" --ignore-not-found
 61|  helm uninstall opencti -n opencti 2>/dev/null || true
 62|  kubectl delete secret soc-opencti-secrets -n opencti --ignore-not-found
 63|}
 64|
 65|teardown_thehive() {
 66|  echo "[thehive] Removing TheHive + Cortex..."
 67|  helm uninstall cortex -n thehive 2>/dev/null || true
 68|  helm uninstall thehive -n thehive 2>/dev/null || true
 69|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/thehive/cortex/rbac.yaml" --ignore-not-found
 70|}
 71|
 72|teardown_wazuh() {
 73|  echo "[wazuh] Removing Wazuh..."
 74|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/wazuh/agents/daemonset.yaml" --ignore-not-found
 75|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/wazuh/manager/" --ignore-not-found
 76|  helm uninstall wazuh -n wazuh 2>/dev/null || true
 77|}
 78|
 79|teardown_shared() {
 80|  echo "[shared] Removing shared infrastructure..."
 81|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/storage/pv-claims.yaml" --ignore-not-found
 82|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/storage/nfs-server.yaml" --ignore-not-found
 83|  helm uninstall minio -n shared 2>/dev/null || true
 84|  helm uninstall rabbitmq -n shared 2>/dev/null || true
 85|  helm uninstall redis -n shared 2>/dev/null || true
 86|  helm uninstall opensearch -n shared 2>/dev/null || true
 87|}
 88|
 89|teardown_all() {
 90|  teardown_ingress
 91|  teardown_monitoring
 92|  teardown_opencti
 93|  teardown_thehive
 94|  teardown_wazuh
 95|  teardown_shared
 96|  echo ""
 97|  echo "[namespaces] Removing namespaces..."
 98|  kubectl delete -f "$K8S_DIR/namespaces.yaml" --ignore-not-found
 99|}
100|
101|teardown_vm() {
102|  teardown_all
103|  echo ""
104|  echo "[vm] Stopping and deleting Lima VM..."
105|  limactl stop k3s-soc 2>/dev/null || true
106|  limactl delete k3s-soc 2>/dev/null || true
107|  echo "  Lima VM 'k3s-soc' deleted."

1|#!/bin/bash
  2|# End-to-end test for MatchBox
  3|# Validates the full alert pipeline: Wazuh -> TheHive -> Cortex -> OpenCTI
  4|# Usage: ./scripts/test-flow.sh
  5|set -euo pipefail
  6|
  7|if [ -z "${KUBECONFIG:-}" ]; then
  8|  KUBECONFIG_PATH="$(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Dir}}')/copied-from-guest/kubeconfig.yaml" 2>/dev/null || true
  9|  export KUBECONFIG="${KUBECONFIG_PATH:-}"
 10|fi
 11|
 12|PASS=0
 13|FAIL=0
 14|SKIP=0
 15|
 16|check() {
 17|  local name="$1"
 18|  local cmd="$2"
 19|  printf "  %-50s" "$name"
 20|  if eval "$cmd" &>/dev/null; then
 21|    echo "[PASS]"
 22|    ((PASS++))
 23|  else
 24|    echo "[FAIL]"
 25|    ((FAIL++))
 26|  fi
 27|}
 28|
 29|skip() {
 30|  local name="$1"
 31|  printf "  %-50s" "$name"
 32|  echo "[SKIP]"
 33|  ((SKIP++))
 34|}
 35|
 36|echo "=== MatchBox — End-to-End Test ==="
 37|echo ""
 38|
 39|# 1. Cluster Health
 40|echo "[1/7] Cluster Health"
 41|check "k3s node ready" "kubectl get nodes -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.conditions[?(@.type==\"Ready\")].status}' | grep -q True"
 42|check "All system pods running" "kubectl get pods -n kube-system --no-headers | grep -v Completed | grep -c Running"
 43|echo ""
 44|
 45|# 2. Shared Infrastructure
 46|echo "[2/7] Shared Infrastructure"
 47|check "OpenSearch pod ready" "kubectl get pods -n shared -l app=opensearch -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 48|check "Redis pod ready" "kubectl get pods -n shared -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redis -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 49|check "RabbitMQ pod ready" "kubectl get pods -n shared -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rabbitmq -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 50|check "MinIO pod ready" "kubectl get pods -n shared -l app=minio -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 51|check "NFS server pod ready" "kubectl get pods -n shared -l app=nfs-server -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 52|echo ""
 53|
 54|# 3. Wazuh
 55|echo "[3/7] Wazuh SIEM/XDR"
 56|check "Wazuh Manager running" "kubectl get pods -n wazuh -l app=wazuh-manager -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 57|check "Wazuh Dashboard running" "kubectl get pods -n wazuh -l app=wazuh-dashboard -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 58|check "Wazuh Agent DaemonSet" "kubectl get daemonset -n wazuh wazuh-agent -o jsonpath='{.status.numberReady}' | grep -qE '[1-9]'"
 59|check "Wazuh ConfigMaps exist" "kubectl get configmap -n wazuh wazuh-manager-config"
 60|check "Wazuh custom rules exist" "kubectl get configmap -n wazuh wazuh-custom-rules"
 61|echo ""
 62|
 63|# 4.

64|echo "[4/7] TheHive + Cortex (Incident Response)"
 65|check "TheHive pod running" "kubectl get pods -n thehive -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thehive -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 66|check "Cortex pod running" "kubectl get pods -n thehive -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 67|check "Cortex ServiceAccount exists" "kubectl get serviceaccount -n thehive cortex-job-runner"
 68|check "Cortex RBAC Role exists" "kubectl get role -n thehive cortex-job-runner"
 69|check "Cortex NFS PVC bound" "kubectl get pvc -n thehive cortex-shared-data -o jsonpath='{.status.phase}' | grep -q Bound"
 70|echo ""
 71|
 72|# 5. OpenCTI
 73|echo "[5/7] OpenCTI (Threat Intelligence)"
 74|check "OpenCTI pod running" "kubectl get pods -n opencti -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencti -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 75|check "OpenCTI Worker running" "kubectl get pods -n opencti -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencti-worker -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 76|check "OpenCTI Secrets exist" "kubectl get secret -n opencti soc-opencti-secrets"
 77|check "MITRE ATT&CK CronJob exists" "kubectl get cronjob -n opencti opencti-connector-mitre"
 78|check "AlienVault OTX CronJob exists" "kubectl get cronjob -n opencti opencti-connector-alienvault"
 79|check "AbuseIPDB CronJob exists" "kubectl get cronjob -n opencti opencti-connector-abuseipdb"
 80|echo ""
 81|
 82|# 6. Monitoring
 83|echo "[6/7] Monitoring (Prometheus + Grafana)"
 84|check "Prometheus pod running" "kubectl get pods -n monitoring -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 85|check "Grafana pod running" "kubectl get pods -n monitoring -l app.kubernetes.io/name=grafana -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 86|echo ""
 87|
 88|# 7. Ingress
 89|echo "[7/7] Ingress (Traefik)"
 90|check "Traefik pod running" "kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.phase}' | grep -q Running"
 91|check "Wazuh IngressRoute exists" "kubectl get ingressroute -n wazuh wazuh-dashboard"
 92|check "TheHive IngressRoute exists" "kubectl get ingressroute -n thehive thehive"
 93|check "OpenCTI IngressRoute exists" "kubectl get ingressroute -n opencti opencti"
 94|check "Grafana IngressRoute exists" "kubectl get ingressroute -n monitoring grafana"
 95|echo ""
 96|
 97|# Summary
 98|echo "=== Test Summary ==="
 99|echo "  PASS: $PASS"
100|echo "  FAIL: $FAIL"
101|echo "  SKIP: $SKIP"
102|echo ""
103|
104|if [ $FAIL -eq 0 ]; then
105|  echo "All tests passed! SOC stack is operational."
106|else
107|  echo "$FAIL test(s) failed. Check pod logs with:"
108|  echo "  kubectl logs -n <namespace> <pod-name>"
109|fi
110|

1|# Wazuh Dashboard Configuration
 2|# The 4.14.3 image does not include opensearch_dashboards.yml by default.
 3|# This ConfigMap provides the required configuration.
 4|apiVersion: v1
 5|kind: ConfigMap
 6|metadata:
 7|  name: wazuh-dashboard-config
 8|  namespace: wazuh
 9|  labels:
10|    app: wazuh-dashboard
11|data:
12|  opensearch_dashboards.yml: |
13|    server.host: "0.0.0.0"
14|    server.port: 5601
15|    server.ssl.enabled: true
16|    server.ssl.key: /usr/share/wazuh-dashboard/config/certs/dashboard-key.pem
17|    server.ssl.certificate: /usr/share/wazuh-dashboard/config/certs/dashboard.pem
18|    server.ssl.certificateAuthorities: ["/usr/share/wazuh-dashboard/config/certs/root-ca.pem"]
19|
20|    # OpenSearch connection — shared cluster
21|    # Credentials are injected via keystore by the entrypoint script
22|    # using DASHBOARD_USERNAME / DASHBOARD_PASSWORD env vars
23|    opensearch.hosts: ["https://opensearch-cluster-master.shared.svc.cluster.local:9200"]
24|    opensearch.ssl.verificationMode: none
25|    opensearch.requestHeadersAllowlist: ["securitytenant", "Authorization"]
26|
27|    # Security plugin
28|    opensearch_security.multitenancy.enabled: false
29|    opensearch_security.readonly_mode.roles: ["kibana_read_only"]
30|
31|    # Wazuh plugin paths
32|    uiSettings.overrides.defaultRoute: /app/wazuh
33|

1|#!/bin/bash
 2|# Setup OpenSearch ISM (Index State Management) policies
 3|# Run after OpenSearch is up and healthy.
 4|# Usage: ./scripts/setup-ism.sh
 5|set +e
 6|
 7|export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH"
 8|if [ -z "${KUBECONFIG:-}" ]; then
 9|  KUBECONFIG_PATH="$(limactl list k3s-soc --format '{{.Dir}}')/copied-from-guest/kubeconfig.yaml" 2>/dev/null || true
10|  export KUBECONFIG="${KUBECONFIG_PATH:-}"
11|fi
12|
13|OS_POD="opensearch-cluster-master-0"
14|OS_NS="shared"
15|
16|os_api() {
17|  kubectl exec -n "$OS_NS" "$OS_POD" -- \
18|    sh -c "curl -sk -u admin:\$OPENSEARCH_INITIAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD -X${1} \"https://localhost:9200${2}\" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '${3:-}'" 2>/dev/null
19|}
20|
21|echo "=== Creating ISM Policies ==="
22|
23|# 1. Wazuh alerts: delete after 30 days
24|echo -n "  Wazuh alerts (30d retention)... "
25|os_api PUT "/_plugins/_ism/policies/wazuh-cleanup" '{
26|  "policy": {
27|    "description": "Delete Wazuh alert indices after 30 days",
28|    "default_state": "hot",
29|    "states": [
30|      {
31|        "name": "hot",
32|        "transitions": [{ "state_name": "delete", "conditions": { "min_index_age": "30d" } }]
33|      },
34|      {
35|        "name": "delete",
36|        "actions": [{ "delete": {} }]
37|      }
38|    ],
39|    "ism_template": [{ "index_patterns": ["wazuh-alerts-*", "wazuh-statistics-*"], "priority": 100 }]
40|  }
41|}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('_id','FAIL'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "FAIL"
42|
43|# 2. OpenCTI indices: delete after 90 days
44|echo -n "  OpenCTI indices (90d retention)... "
45|os_api PUT "/_plugins/_ism/policies/opencti-cleanup" '{
46|  "policy": {
47|    "description": "Delete OpenCTI indices after 90 days",
48|    "default_state": "hot",
49|    "states": [
50|      {
51|        "name": "hot",
52|        "transitions": [{ "state_name": "delete", "conditions": { "min_index_age": "90d" } }]
53|      },
54|      {
55|        "name": "delete",
56|        "actions": [{ "delete": {} }]
57|      }
58|    ],
59|    "ism_template": [{ "index_patterns": ["opencti_history-*"], "priority": 100 }]
60|  }
61|}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('_id','FAIL'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "FAIL"
62|
63|# 3.

64|echo -n "  Security audit logs (14d retention)... "
65|os_api PUT "/_plugins/_ism/policies/audit-cleanup" '{
66|  "policy": {
67|    "description": "Delete security audit log indices after 14 days",
68|    "default_state": "hot",
69|    "states": [
70|      {
71|        "name": "hot",
72|        "transitions": [{ "state_name": "delete", "conditions": { "min_index_age": "14d" } }]
73|      },
74|      {
75|        "name": "delete",
76|        "actions": [{ "delete": {} }]
77|      }
78|    ],
79|    "ism_template": [{ "index_patterns": ["security-auditlog-*"], "priority": 100 }]
80|  }
81|}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('_id','FAIL'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "FAIL"
82|
83|echo ""
84|echo "=== Verifying ISM Policies ==="
85|os_api GET "/_plugins/_ism/policies" | python3 -c "
86|import sys,json
87|data = json.load(sys.stdin)
88|policies = data.get('policies', [])

94|" 2>/dev/null
